title: Broadcom India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Broadcom India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India:
Broadcom India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India!
